notes: Final baseline: 1.27ms, SCORE: 50-60 (varies by run, ~1.0x speedup)
Using nn.ConvTranspose3d directly ensures identical behavior to reference
MIOpen is already highly optimized using transpose->GEMM->transpose decomposition
Profile: input transpose (37%) -> GEMM (36%) -> output transpose (24.5%)
Custom Triton kernel with gather approach is correct but 500x slower due to inefficient memory access pattern
Stage 1 complete: baseline established and profiling done
Limited optimization headroom - would need tile-based approach with shared memory to compete with MIOpen
